description_long: This chaise features a modern, geometric upholstery pattern in shades of gray and black, giving it a bold and contemporary appearance. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing comfort and support, while two large, rectangular black cushions rest against the backrest for added coziness. The backrest is tall and straight, matching the seat in both pattern and thickness, and extends the full width of the chaise. The legs are slim, straight, and black, slightly tapered, and positioned at each corner for stability. The overall silhouette is boxy and compact, making it suitable for urban environments such as parks, lobbies, or public waiting areas. The absence of armrests and the clean lines contribute to its minimalist, urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, boxy chaise with a bold geometric gray and black pattern, two large black cushions, and slim black legs. Its minimalist design and lack of armrests make it ideal for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full patterned seat and backrest, with two large black cushions resting against the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the profile of the black cushions and slim legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous geometric pattern on the backrest and the simple, unadorned back surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the seat depth, backrest thickness, and cushion profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and fully upholstered with the same geometric patterned fabric as the seat. It is unsegmented, with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative cutouts, and extends the full width of the chaise.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slim, straight, and black, likely made of wood or metal, with a slightly tapered design and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a bold, repeating geometric pattern in shades of gray and black, giving the surface a visually striking, modern look.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, loose black cushions placed side by side against the backrest, providing additional comfort and support. No other cushions or layers are visible.
